answers: Whiskey: distilled grain spirit aged in barrels. Scotch, bourbon, Irish, Japanese — each unique.
Exploring whiskey is a delicious journey. Try different varieties and styles.
The world of whiskey is rich and diverse. Start with the basics and expand your palate.
Whiskey has a fascinating history and culture behind it. Learn and enjoy!

feelings.question: whiskey types ki ki?
feelings.answer: Whiskey is a distilled grain spirit aged in barrels. Each type has its unique flavor profile and history, with Scotch being the most popular and Japanese whisky becoming increasingly popular among consumers.
